claims.subject: HelixPay Core
claims.evidence: HelixPay Core — merchant payments processing. Cards, cross-border, FX. The original product. Most of the revenue.
claims.object_value: merchant payments processing; cards, cross-border, FX

claims.subject: HelixPay Core
claims.evidence: Five products, in roughly order of revenue: HelixPay Core — merchant payments processing. Cards, cross-border, FX. The original product. Most of the revenue.

claims.subject: HelixPay POS
claims.evidence: HelixPay POS — physical card-reader terminal plus its companion app. SMB-focused.
claims.object_value: physical card-reader terminal plus companion app; SMB-focused

claims.subject: HelixPay Loyalty
claims.evidence: HelixPay Loyalty — customer-loyalty add-on that sits on top of POS or Core. Smaller, growing.
claims.object_value: customer-loyalty add-on on top of POS or Core; smaller, growing
